positive: A whimsical, stylized representation of a majestic fox silhouette surrounded by blooming celestial flowers and swirling nebulae. The fox is rendered in a deep burnt orange and burnt sienna color palette, contrasting sharply against a midnight blue and violet background. The composition is centered, featuring a strong vertical silhouette of the fox leaping through a cluster of stylized, bioluminescent flowers (like stylized mandalas). The flowers have clean, graphic edges and glow with subtle gold and cyan accents. The overall style is a neo-tribal, graphic vector art illustration with high contrast, strong linework, and a dreamy, ethereal quality. Clean lines, graphic design poster, high contrast digital art, isolated on a solid background for print application.
negative: blur, artifacts, low quality, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, bokeh, photo, photographic, realism, messy lines, grunge, busy background
